items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-CORE-MVP-MEMORY-BINDING-POLICY-CORRECTION-001 and does not substitute runtime remediation, local config mutation, release, or publish work.
All changed files remain within the Cell allowed paths, with no src, package, workflow, deploy, local config, DB content, docs/v2, schema, fixture, runner, branch protection, or ruleset edits.
The docs cite the issue #228 owner/operator correction and preserve it as the authoritative classification policy.
The only approved SQLite exception remains the FX lane: tsumiage-claude and tsumiage-codex.
The eight current non-FX SQLite bindings are classified as migrate-to-PostgreSQL-if-retained or inactive/archive, and not as broad SQLite exception candidates.
Lead/stale/deleted/replaced aliases are directed to inactive/archive cleanup and are not revived through migration work.
Low/no-count retained PostgreSQL bindings remain smoke-required or inactive/duplicate, not silently remediated.
Diff checks and changed YAML/JSON parse evidence are present and match the reported scope.
The PR does not authorize backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, federation, release, publish, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
